.file-embed.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-files-container.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.nav-header.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(239, 241, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(239, 241, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(139, 143, 249, 0.5) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(229, 232, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(229, 232, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(229, 232, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(229, 232, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(229, 232, 238) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(239, 241, 245) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(0deg, rgb(255, 213, 0) 0px, rgb(255, 213, 0) 2px, rgba(250, 246, 156, 0.2) 2px, rgba(250, 246, 156, 0.2) 100%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(249, 250, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
